zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard I Lord of Egmond於1200年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓時，他的父親Willem I van Egmond20歲，母親Badeloch Clementina van Amstel18歲。他於大約1220年與Beatrix van Haarlem結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1242年12月25日在莫三比克特卡拉 巴薩坎迪亞享年42歲，埋葬在希臘馬格希亞昌尼亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard I Lord of Egmond于1200年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓时，他的父亲Willem I van Egmond20岁，母亲Badeloch Clementina van Amstel18岁。他于大约1220年与Beatrix van Haarlem结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1242年12月25日在莫桑比克特卡拉 巴薩坎迪亞享年42岁，埋葬在希腊馬格希亞昌尼亞。

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.description: The Crusades and the Latin rule of Constantinople.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard I Lord of Egmond was born in 1200, in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Willem I van Egmond, was 20 and his mother, Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, was 18. He married Beatrix van Haarlem about 1220. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 December 1242, in Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mozambique, at the age of 42, and was buried in Chania, Magnesia, Greece.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard I Lord of Egmond est né en 1200, à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Willem I van Egmond, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix van Haarlem environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1242, à Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mozambique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Chania, Magnesia, Grèce.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard I Lord of Egmond 1200 in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willem I van Egmond 20 und seine Mutter Badeloch Clementina van Amstel 18. Er hat um 1220 Beatrix van Haarlem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1242 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mosambik und wurde in Chania, Magnesia, Griechenland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard I Lord of Egmond è nato il nel 1200 nel Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Willem I van Egmond, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix van Haarlem circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 dicembre 1242, nel Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mozambico, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Chania, Magnesia, Grecia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard I Lord of Egmondが1200年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンで生まれた時，父Willem I van Egmondは20歳，母Badeloch Clementina van Amstelは18歳であった。約1220年にBeatrix van Haarlemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1242年12月25日にモザンビークテトカホラ バッサカンディアで42歳で死去し，ギリシャマグネシアチャニアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard I Lord of Egmond(이)가 1200년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willem I van Egmond(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Badeloch Clementina van Amstel(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 Beatrix van Haarlem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 12월 25일 모잠비크 테트 카호라 배사 캔디아에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 그리스 매그네샤 챈이아에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherland: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Birth Place: Egmond aan Zee, Bergen Muni: Egmond, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard I Lord of Egmond nasceu em 1200, em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Willem I van Egmond, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix van Haarlem aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1242, em Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Moçambique, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Chania, Magnesia, Grécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard I Lord of Egmond родился в 1200 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Willem I van Egmond было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix van Haarlem около 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 декабря 1242 г. в местности кандя, кахаура басса, тет, Мозамбик в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности чаня, магнеся, Греция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard I Lord of Egmond nació en 1200, en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Willem I van Egmond, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Badeloch Clementina van Amstel, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Beatrix van Haarlem aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1242, en Candia, Cahora Bassa, Tete, Mozambique, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Chania, Magnesia, Grecia.
